assertions.assertion: Configures AddJwtBearer with an Authority and Audience for the DCR scheme
assertions.rationale: AddJwtBearer("dcr") with Authority and Audience configured

assertions.assertion: Creates an authorization policy that requires an authenticated user and a specific scope claim
assertions.rationale: Policy requires authenticated user and scope claim IdentityServer.Configuration

assertions.assertion: Applies RequireAuthorization with the named policy to MapDynamicClientRegistration()
Uses AddAuthentication() and AddAuthorization() with proper policy configuration
Does NOT expose MapDynamicClientRegistration() without authorization
